title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Heritage Foods Retail

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Heritage Foods Retail
jsonLd.description:
We at Heritage Foods Retail are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Heritage Foods Retail:
Heritage Foods Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
